package rulecoverage

func PositiveCmdOrMainContainsDomainRules() string {
    ruleID := "cmd_or_main_contains_domain_rules"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`main` or `cmd` packages that contain business-rule branches instead of wiring and startup concerns."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
